title: GenomeLens 局部共线性
description: 用于围绕候选基因或目标位点绘制局部共线性图，观察上下游邻域在另一个物种中是否仍保持顺序、方向和对应关系。它非常适合做候选基因验证、功能转移参考和微观结构保守性分析。
description_en: Renders local synteny around candidate genes or target loci, allowing users to inspect whether the upstream and downstream neighborhoods preserve order, orientation, and correspondence in the other species. It is especially useful for candidate-gene validation, cross-species functional transfer, and fine-scale structural conservation analysis.
context: 目标位点上下游微共线性保守关系展示。
context_en: Visualization of micro-synteny conservation around target loci.

params.label: 输入目录
params.description: 包含双物种注释与序列文件的目录，用于恢复目标区域的基因顺序、坐标和物种背景信息。
params.description_en: Directory containing the annotation and sequence files for the species pair, used to recover gene order, coordinates, and species context around the target region.

params.label: Blocks 文件
params.description: 双物种共线性区块文件，用于从全基因组结果中筛出与目标基因相关的局部保守连接。
params.description_en: Pairwise synteny blocks file used to extract the local conserved links associated with the target gene from the whole-genome result.

params.label: 目标基因 ID
params.description: 要重点观察的目标基因 ID。插件会围绕这些基因截取上下游窗口，并组织成局部共线性图；多个基因用逗号分隔。
params.description_en: Target gene IDs to inspect. The plugin extracts upstream and downstream windows around these genes and organizes them into local synteny figures; separate multiple IDs with commas.

params.label: 输出目录
params.description: 局部共线性图输出目录。这里通常会生成围绕目标位点的局部图件及其相关中间文件。
params.description_en: Output directory for local synteny results. This usually contains the local figures centered on target loci together with related intermediate files.

params.label: 上游窗口基因数
params.description: 在每个目标基因上游纳入多少个基因进入局部图，数值越大越适合观察更长距离的邻域保守性。
params.description_en: How many genes upstream of each target gene should be included in the local figure. Larger values are better for inspecting broader neighborhood conservation.

params.label: 下游窗口基因数
params.description: 在每个目标基因下游纳入多少个基因进入局部图，与上游窗口共同决定局部区域大小。
params.description_en: How many genes downstream of each target gene should be included in the local figure. Together with the upstream window, this determines the size of the local region.

params.label: 多个目标各自出图
params.description: 多个目标基因时分别输出独立图件，方便逐个比对不同位点的保守模式。
params.description_en: Generate a separate figure for each target gene, making it easier to compare conservation patterns across different loci.

params.label: 标注目标基因
params.description: 在局部共线性图中直接标注目标基因名称，便于人工核对与结果汇报。
params.description_en: Label target gene names directly on local synteny figures for easier manual checking and reporting.

params.label: 使用原生局部共线性渲染器 (GenomeLens)
params.description: 启用 GenomeLens 增强渲染器，以更稳定地展示跨染色体命中、截断轨道与复杂多段局部区域。
params.description_en: Enable the enhanced GenomeLens renderer for more robust display of cross-chromosome hits, truncated tracks, and complex multi-segment local regions.

params.label: 输出格式
params.description: 局部共线性图输出格式。若需要后续编辑标签或版式，优先选择矢量格式。
params.description_en: Output format for local synteny figures. Vector formats are preferred if you expect to edit labels or layout later.
